Why work with me

Skilled support,
real impact

"The common thread across everything I've done is that I like figuring out how things work and making them work better."

Detail-orientedProactiveSelf-directed Async-friendlyClear communicatorEA-level support

My experience spans operations support, workflow organization, program management, and content management, helping businesses maintain efficiency behind the scenes.

I've supported a Group Executive Director as Executive Assistant, coordinated a 12,800+ learner training programme, built a 32-week UNDP curriculum from scratch, and managed the full digital presence for multiple brands simultaneously.

I bring clarity and structure to every workflow I touch, and I genuinely enjoy the behind-the-scenes work that makes everything else possible.

What I offer

How I can help you

From inbox zero to content calendars, I handle the work that keeps your business running so you can focus on growing it.

Programme Operations · Schull Technology

Employability Curriculum Project
Researched and developed content for a 32-week employability and mentorship programme.
